name: com.basis.setup
description: Replicates the project-level configuration Unity requires to live under Assets/ (Addressables, XR, URP rendering defaults, quality, input, highlight, Steam Audio, link.xml, Android templates, SteamVR bindings). Maintainers bake the golden project's config into the package's Templates~ store; consumers install/update from those verbatim, GUID-preserved templates.
